name: Mafia Lamsing
original_name: มาเฟียลำซิ่ง
overview: At the Mor Lam stage...the Samniang Thong group was performing on stage, with Fa (Tao Phusin) singing on stage. Faha Chuan Fonthip (Krittha Sangsaopas), her younger sister, came up to sing as well. But at the same time Below the stage, there was a story.

trailers.title: มาเฟียลำซิ่ง [Official Trailer]
